DFFlagStopSendingChunkSizeStat.purpose: Improves performance by reducing unnecessary data traffic.

FFlagTypeBandwidthMetrics.mechanism: Tracks and reports the amount of data used during gameplay.
FFlagTypeBandwidthMetrics.purpose: Helps players understand their internet usage while playing.

FFlagDurationAlertOnlyForLongFlows_Stage.mechanism: Sends alerts only for longer loading times instead of all.
FFlagDurationAlertOnlyForLongFlows_Stage.purpose: Reduces unnecessary notifications, improving the user experience.

FFlagSlimHandleMeshLoadException_Staged.mechanism: Improves error handling when loading 3D models.
FFlagSlimHandleMeshLoadException_Staged.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by minimizing disruptions from loading issues.

FFlagVideoRvFrameFixPngColor_Staged.mechanism: Fixes color issues in video frames that use PNG images.
FFlagVideoRvFrameFixPngColor_Staged.purpose: Enhances visual quality of videos for a better viewing experience.

FFlagAppChatEnableConversationUserTileAv.mechanism: Displays user avatars in chat conversations.
FFlagAppChatEnableConversationUserTileAv.purpose: Makes chat more engaging and personal by showing who is speaking.

DFIntMigrateTriangleMeshPartTestScale_St.mechanism: Adjusts the scaling of triangle mesh parts in the game engine.
DFIntMigrateTriangleMeshPartTestScale_St.purpose: Improves the visual quality and performance of 3D models in games.

FFlagLogoutPhoneVerificationUpsellCopy_v.mechanism: Changes the messaging shown during phone verification when logging out.
FFlagLogoutPhoneVerificationUpsellCopy_v.purpose: Encourages players to verify their phone numbers for better account security.
